## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and EpicVIN to discuss potential SEO and content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [EpicVIN operates multiple car-related businesses, including vehicle history reports and auction brokerage](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [EpicVIN experienced a significant traffic drop after a Google update in August, struggling to diagnose and address the issue](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation at scale, blending automation with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes an 8-week, $20K strategy sprint, followed by a potential 12-month engagement starting at $15K/month](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Topics

### EpicVIN's Business and Challenges

  - [Multiple car-related businesses: vehicle history reports, auction car sales, corporate auction brokerage](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Experienced significant traffic drop after August Google update](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Difficulty diagnosing root cause of traffic decline](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Added vehicle classifieds section pre-update, leading to millions of new keywords](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Competing in a crowded space with numerous competitors (e.g., VinAudit.com, Bumper.com, Carfax)](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [AI-powered content creation blended with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20K) to develop roadmap and calibrate approach](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Typical 12-month engagement starting at $15K/month (range: $9K-$30K)](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Team includes high-level experts (e.g., former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, SEO leader from Fanatics)](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Focus on operating like a publisher, creating quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Claimed cost efficiency: \~$0.10 per word vs. traditional methods](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Content Quality and SEO Concerns

  - [EpicVIN expressed concerns about AI-generated content being excluded from search results](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [GrowthX argues focus should be on overall content quality, not AI vs. human-generated](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [GrowthX claims to have stress-tested their approach, seeing sustainable rankings and engagement](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Engagement Structure and Guarantees

  - [EpicVIN expressed concern about 12-month commitment without guaranteed results](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [GrowthX explained strategy sprint as a way to de-risk longer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [No early termination options offered in 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [GrowthX willing to share case studies and impact examples in follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send Statement of Work (SoW) for review](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to discuss:](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)
      - [Specific opportunities GrowthX sees for EpicVIN](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1765.0)
      - [More details on GrowthX's working process and outputs](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
      - [How GrowthX will measure and attribute results](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
      - [Strategies for appearing in AI-generated search results](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Explore potential June start date for strategy sprint if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/HGkQXgmYFgQpdf2yVdV_xHKvo5KuWszm?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
